title: T-062 — E2E pipeline test: HACCP plan → CCP tick → deviation → auto-NCR → auto-hold + allergen-gate consume-block
prompt:
# T-062 — E2E HACCP→NCR pipeline + allergen-gate consume-block

PRD: §10.2 ccp_deviation_escalation_v1, §11.5 V-QA-CCP-003, §11.6 V-QA-ALLERGEN-001/002, §12.1 outbox

## Goal
Integration test verifying the full 09-e wiring: HACCP plan active → CCP tick out-of-limits → ccp_deviation_escalation_v1 fires → autoCreate NCR draft + auto-hold WO. Separately: allergen-gate active hold blocks any consumption attempt against the affected WO (cross-module 08-PROD WO consume guard).

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/__tests__/integration/quality-e-pipeline.test.ts — pnpm-vitest integration test using a clean test DB.
2. Setup: activate a HACCP plan (T-051), create a biological CCP with limit_min=72 deviation_threshold_seconds=0.
3. Action 1: monitorCcpTick with measured_value=68 (out-of-limits) AND linked wo_id.
4. Assert chain: haccp_monitoring_records row with within_limits=false → ccp_deviation_escalation_v1 fires → 1 new ncr_reports row with severity='critical' reference_type='ccp_deviation' reference_id=monitoring_record.id → quality.ncr.created event emitted → 1 quality_holds row created via auto_hold with reason='ccp_deviation_escalation' priority='critical' reference_type='wo' reference_id=wo_id → quality.hold.created event emitted.
5. Allergen gate test: create an allergen_changeover_validations row first_signed_by=A status='pending_second_sign' atp_pass=false risk_level='high'; assert T-055 signSecondAllergenGate fails with V-QA-ALLERGEN-002 AND the linked WO consumption (via 08-PROD WO consume Server Action stub or 05-WH consume guard) is blocked because v_active_holds view contains the gate-blocked WO (T-064 cross-module contract).

## Files
- apps/web/__tests__/integration/quality-e-pipeline.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/__tests__/integration/fixtures/quality-e-pipeline-fixtures.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the HACCP plan + biological CCP fixture, when monitorCcpTick(measured_value=68, wo_id=W1) runs, then within 1 transaction the test asserts: haccp_monitoring_records row with within_limits=false exists; 1 ncr_reports row with severity='critical' reference_type='ccp_deviation' exists; quality.ncr.created event row exists in outbox; 1 quality_holds row with reference_type='wo' reference_id=W1 reason='ccp_deviation_escalation' priority='critical' exists; quality.hold.created event row exists
2. Given an allergen gate with atp_pass=false AND risk_level='high', when T-055 signSecondAllergenGate runs, then it returns 422 error.code='V-QA-ALLERGEN-002' and validation_result is NOT 'approved'
3. Given the gate above with status='pending_second_sign' on WO=W2 AND a quality_holds row for W2 reference_type='wo' priority='critical' status='open' exists, when 05-WH/08-PROD consume Server Action (T-064 stub) attempts to consume an LP linked to W2, then it returns 409 error.code='QA_HOLD_ACTIVE' citing the WO hold (consumption-gate contract)
4. Given full pipeline replay (idempotency), when the same CCP tick is replayed with the same monitoring_record_id, then no duplicate NCR or hold rows are created (idempotency keys from T-040+T-041)

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: quality-e-pipeline.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs as integration before code dependencies are wired
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test integration/quality-e-pipeline'

## Risk red lines
- Use a clean integration DB (txn-rollback or test schema reset) — never run against demo seed
- Set app.current_org_id() before any DB write (Wave0 v4.3 RLS contract)
- Do not skip outbox event assertions (cross-module event contract per audit A §1)
- WO consume guard test stubs the 05-WH/08-PROD Server Action — the actual consumption gate is owned by 05-WH (T-064 cross-module contract pin in this batch)

pipeline_inputs.description: E2E integration test: HACCP plan → CCP tick out-of-limits → ccp_deviation_escalation_v1 → auto-NCR + auto-hold; allergen-gate ATP fail blocks consumption via v_active_holds.
pipeline_inputs.details: Vitest integration test on clean DB. Fixtures: HACCP plan + biological CCP (limit_min=72, threshold_seconds=0). monitorCcpTick(68, wo_id=W1) → assert full chain (haccp_monitoring_records + ncr_reports + quality_holds + outbox events). Allergen gate fixture: pending_second_sign + atp_pass=false + risk_level='high' → signSecondAllergenGate rejects (V-QA-ALLERGEN-002). Cross-module: a quality_holds row on WO blocks the 05-WH/08-PROD consume Server Action (T-064 contract stub). Idempotency: replayed events do not duplicate rows.
out_of_scope: Do not implement 05-WH consume guard (T-064 stub)
Do not modify NCR/hold Server Actions or rule handler
Do not run against production/demo data
acceptance_criteria: Given HACCP plan + biological CCP fixture, when monitorCcpTick(68, wo_id=W1) runs, then haccp_monitoring_records (within_limits=false) + 1 ncr_reports (severity=critical, reference_type=ccp_deviation) + 1 quality_holds (wo, ccp_deviation_escalation, critical) + outbox events quality.ncr.created + quality.hold.created all exist
Given allergen gate atp_pass=false risk_level='high', when T-055 signSecondAllergenGate runs, then 422 error.code='V-QA-ALLERGEN-002' and validation_result is not 'approved'

Given a quality_holds row on WO W2 (reference_type=wo, priority=critical, status=open), when the 05-WH/08-PROD consume Server Action stub attempts consumption of an LP linked to W2, then 409 error.code='QA_HOLD_ACTIVE' citing the WO hold
Given full pipeline replay with same monitoring_record_id, when ccp_deviation_escalation_v1 fires twice, then no duplicate NCR or hold rows are created (idempotency keys from T-040 + T-041)
test_strategy: RED: quality-e-pipeline.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs as integration before code dependencies are wired
risk_red_lines: Use clean integration DB (txn-rollback or test schema reset) — never run against demo seed
Set app.current_org_id() before any DB write (Wave0 v4.3 RLS)
Do not skip outbox event assertions (audit A §1 cross-module contract)
WO consume guard test stubs the 05-WH/08-PROD Server Action (T-064 is the contract pin)
